memory.summary: I planned to finish the assignment analysis first, but my friends are inviting me to lunch right now. With my current energy and sleep debt, I'm tempted to skip the work for this social opportunity.
Lunch is tempting with my low sleep debt, but skipping the analysis now risks a major grade drop later. I need to push through this social urge to protect my academic outcomes.
My friends are pushing for lunch now, but my sleep debt makes skipping the assignment analysis too risky for my grades. I need to ignore their push and finish the work first.
My friends keep pushing for lunch, but my sleep debt makes skipping this analysis too risky. I need to shut them down and finish the work now.

desires: Finish the analysis section immediately to secure the grade and avoid the risk of failure caused by my sleep debt.
Shut down the friends' lunch invitation firmly without feeling guilty, prioritizing my academic output over their social pressure.
Complete the reading before 20:00 so I don't have to carry unfinished tasks into tomorrow's stress cycle.

goals.description: Reject the lunch invite from cohort_3 immediately and send a blunt text stating I'm working on a critical deadline, prioritizing academic output over social approval.
goals.rationale: My achievement value (0.5) dictates that failing this assignment is unacceptable; my impulsive nature makes me want to cut the 'social awkwardness' now rather than deal with it later. My assertive style means I won't apologize excessively or negotiate; I'll just say no and get back to work.

goals.description: Execute the remaining analysis section of the assignment without interruption, aiming for a complete submission by 18:00.
goals.rationale: This is the highest-value task available. With a short planning horizon, I'm only focused on the immediate 18:00 deadline. Anything else is noise until this is locked down.

goals.description: Skim the assigned reading quickly to meet the 20:00 requirement, treating it as a low-efficiency cleanup task.
goals.rationale: The reading is already 95% done. Given my procrastination bias and current focus on the harder analysis, this gets pushed to after the main deadline. It's necessary but not urgent compared to the grade at stake.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm ignoring the lunch invite to crush this deadline. My achievement drive demands a perfect grade, and my impulsive nature wants to cut social awkwardness now. I'll send a blunt text later if needed, but right now, finishing this analysis is the only thing that matters.

goals.description: Reply to cohort_3 chat immediately to accept the lunch invite and secure social standing before I lose momentum.
goals.rationale: My impulsive time preference makes me discount future awkwardness; if I don't say yes now, I risk looking like a buzzkill. My assertive conflict style means I'll just join rather than over-explain, preserving energy for the actual work later.

goals.description: Eat the meal with full focus on enjoyment, suppressing guilt about unfinished reading.
goals.rationale: I need to recharge my physical stamina (currently at 6/10) to tackle the hard analysis section. Guilt is inefficient; I'm going to treat this as a necessary refueling stop, not a distraction.

goals.description: Resume assignment analysis immediately after eating, aiming to finish before 18:00.
goals.rationale: Academic outcomes are my top value (0.5 weight). While I want to enjoy lunch, the deadline pressure requires me to lock in this task as the next priority once the social interaction concludes.

desires: Get my lunch invite accepted so I don't look like a buzzkill to the cohort right now
Finish the assignment analysis before 18:00 without having to beg for an extension later
Actually enjoy this meal instead of feeling guilty while eating
